panels.title: 수율 (Yield) 추이 — SPC 관리도
panels.description: UCL 99% / LCL 98%. 관리 한계선 이탈 시 공정 이상 의심.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:00Z', datetime(StartTIme, '-9 hours')) AS time, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN Item = 'PASS' THEN 1.0 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*) * 100, 2) AS yield FROM inspection_results WHERE StartTIme >= datetime('now', '-15 hours') GROUP BY strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:00', datetime(StartTIme, '-9 hours')) ORDER BY time ASC

SELECT strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:00Z', datetime(StartTIme, '-9 hours')) AS time, 99.0 AS target FROM inspection_results WHERE StartTIme >= datetime('now', '-15 hours') GROUP BY strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:00', datetime(StartTIme, '-9 hours')) ORDER BY time ASC

panels.title: 평균 처리시간 (Duration) — ms
panels.description: 검사 1건당 소요시간. 급증 시 카메라/조명 이상 의심.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:00Z', datetime(StartTIme, '-9 hours')) AS time, ROUND(AVG(Duration), 1) AS avg_ms, MAX(Duration) AS max_ms FROM inspection_results WHERE StartTIme >= datetime('now', '-15 hours') GROUP BY strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:00', datetime(StartTIme, '-9 hours')) ORDER BY time ASC

panels.title: 불량 유형별 건수 (파레토)
panels.description: 불량 원인 분포. 상위 원인부터 정렬.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT Item AS error_type, COUNT(*) AS count FROM inspection_results WHERE Item != 'PASS' AND StartTIme >= datetime('now', '-15 hours') GROUP BY Item ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 10

panels.title: 오프셋 드리프트 (XOffset / YOffset)
panels.description: 정렬 오프셋 변화 추이. 한쪽으로 계속 이동하면 Alignment 이상.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:00Z', datetime(StartTIme, '-9 hours')) AS time, ROUND(AVG(XOffset),3) AS x_offset, ROUND(AVG(YOffset),3) AS y_offset FROM inspection_results WHERE StartTIme >= datetime('now', '-15 hours') GROUP BY strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:00', datetime(StartTIme, '-9 hours')) ORDER BY time ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM inspection_results WHERE date(StartTIme) = date('now', '+9 hours')
SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM inspection_results WHERE Item = 'PASS' AND date(StartTIme) = date('now', '+9 hours')
SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM inspection_results WHERE Item LIKE '%NoDevice%' AND date(StartTIme) = date('now', '+9 hours')
SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM inspection_results WHERE Item != 'PASS' AND Item NOT LIKE '%NoDevice%' AND Item NOT LIKE '%XOut%' AND date(StartTIme) = date('now', '+9 hours')
SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM inspection_results WHERE Item LIKE '%XOut%' AND date(StartTIme) = date('now', '+9 hours')
SELECT ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN Item='PASS' THEN 1.0 ELSE 0 END)/COUNT(*)*100, 2) AS value FROM inspection_results WHERE date(StartTIme) = date('now', '+9 hours')
SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM inspection_results WHERE InspectionType=1 AND date(StartTIme)=date('now','+9 hours')
SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM inspection_results WHERE InspectionType=1 AND Item='PASS' AND date(StartTIme)=date('now','+9 hours')
SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM inspection_results WHERE InspectionType=1 AND Item LIKE '%NoDevice%' AND date(StartTIme)=date('now','+9 hours')
SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM inspection_results WHERE InspectionType=1 AND Item LIKE '%Reject%' AND date(StartTIme)=date('now','+9 hours')
SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM inspection_results WHERE InspectionType=1 AND Item LIKE '%DataCode%' AND date(StartTIme)=date('now','+9 hours')
SELECT ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN Item='PASS' THEN 1.0 ELSE 0 END)/COUNT(*)*100,2) AS value FROM inspection_results WHERE InspectionType=1 AND date(StartTIme)=date('now','+9 hours')
SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM inspection_results WHERE InspectionType=3 AND date(StartTIme)=date('now','+9 hours')
SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM inspection_results WHERE InspectionType=3 AND Item='PASS' AND date(StartTIme)=date('now','+9 hours')
SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM inspection_results WHERE InspectionType=3 AND Item LIKE '%NoDevice%' AND date(StartTIme)=date('now','+9 hours')
SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM inspection_results WHERE InspectionType=3 AND Item IN ('CONTAMINATION','TILT','MISSING_BALL','LEAD_OPEN','LEAD_SHORT') AND date(StartTIme)=date('now','+9 hours')
SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM inspection_results WHERE InspectionType=3 AND Item LIKE '%Reject%' AND date(StartTIme)=date('now','+9 hours')
SELECT ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN Item='PASS' THEN 1.0 ELSE 0 END)/COUNT(*)*100,2) AS value FROM inspection_results WHERE InspectionType=3 AND date(StartTIme)=date('now','+9 hours')

panels.title: 불량 발생 추이 (시간당)
panels.description: 시간대별 불량 건수. 급증 구간이 유지보수 개입 시점.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:00:00Z', datetime(StartTIme, '-9 hours')) AS time, COUNT(*) AS fail_count FROM inspection_results WHERE Item != 'PASS' AND StartTIme >= datetime('now', '-15 hours') GROUP BY strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H', datetime(StartTIme, '-9 hours')) ORDER BY time ASC

panels.title: 불량 유형 파레토 (오늘)
panels.description: 누적 불량 원인 Top 5. 가장 빈번한 원인부터 집중 점검.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT Item AS error_type, COUNT(*) AS count FROM inspection_results WHERE Item != 'PASS' AND date(StartTIme) = date('now', '+9 hours') GROUP BY Item ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 5

panels.title: 불량 유형별 시계열 (1분 단위)
panels.description: GOOD / NO DEVICE / REJECT / X-OUT 건수 추이.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:00Z', datetime(StartTIme, '-9 hours')) AS time, SUM(CASE WHEN Item='PASS' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS GOOD FROM inspection_results WHERE StartTIme >= datetime('now', '-15 hours') GROUP BY strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M', datetime(StartTIme, '-9 hours')) ORDER BY time ASC

SELECT strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:00Z', datetime(StartTIme, '-9 hours')) AS time, SUM(CASE WHEN Item LIKE '%NoDevice%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS NO_DEVICE FROM inspection_results WHERE StartTIme >= datetime('now', '-15 hours') GROUP BY strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M', datetime(StartTIme, '-9 hours')) ORDER BY time ASC

SELECT strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:00Z', datetime(StartTIme, '-9 hours')) AS time, SUM(CASE WHEN Item!='PASS' AND Item NOT LIKE '%NoDevice%' AND Item NOT LIKE '%XOut%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REJECT FROM inspection_results WHERE StartTIme >= datetime('now', '-15 hours') GROUP BY strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M', datetime(StartTIme, '-9 hours')) ORDER BY time ASC

SELECT strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:00Z', datetime(StartTIme, '-9 hours')) AS time, SUM(CASE WHEN Item LIKE '%XOut%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS XOUT FROM inspection_results WHERE StartTIme >= datetime('now', '-15 hours') GROUP BY strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M', datetime(StartTIme, '-9 hours')) ORDER BY time ASC

panels.title: MARK / BGA / 2D CODE 불량 시계열 (1분 단위)
panels.description: 검사 타입별 불량 건수 추이. MARK=InspectionType 1, BGA=InspectionType 3, 2D CODE=DataCode 항목.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:00Z', datetime(StartTIme, '-9 hours')) AS time, SUM(CASE WHEN Item!='PASS' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS MARK_NG FROM inspection_results WHERE InspectionType=1 AND StartTIme >= datetime('now', '-15 hours') GROUP BY strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M', datetime(StartTIme, '-9 hours')) ORDER BY time ASC

SELECT strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:00Z', datetime(StartTIme, '-9 hours')) AS time, SUM(CASE WHEN Item!='PASS' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS BGA_NG FROM inspection_results WHERE InspectionType=3 AND StartTIme >= datetime('now', '-15 hours') GROUP BY strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M', datetime(StartTIme, '-9 hours')) ORDER BY time ASC

SELECT strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:00Z', datetime(StartTIme, '-9 hours')) AS time, SUM(CASE WHEN Item LIKE '%DataCode%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS DATACODE_NG FROM inspection_results WHERE StartTIme >= datetime('now', '-15 hours') GROUP BY strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M', datetime(StartTIme, '-9 hours')) ORDER BY time ASC

SELECT strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ', datetime(substr(Time,1,19), '-9 hours')) AS 시각, CASE LogType WHEN 1 THEN 'System' WHEN 4 THEN 'LOT' WHEN 5 THEN 'Recipe' ELSE CAST(LogType AS TEXT) END AS 구분, substr(Description,1,100) AS 내용 FROM histories WHERE Time >= datetime('now', '-15 hours') AND LogType IN (1,4,5) ORDER BY Time DESC LIMIT 100
